opportunities.web_prompt:
# Lead Generation Website Build — Trucking accident attorney in Blue Mountains NSW

## Overview
Build a high-converting, mobile-first lead generation website for **Trucking accident attorney** targeting **Blue Mountains NSW**. This is a Rank & Rent site designed to capture leads and forward them to a local service provider for a monthly fee of **$5,000**.

## Target Market
- **Location:** Blue Mountains NSW
- **Service:** Trucking accident attorney
- **Average Job Value:** $55,000
- **Urgency Level:** 6/10 (High priority — same day response)
- **Page Type:** legal_service

## Primary Keywords to Target
- Main: "Trucking accident attorney Blue Mountains NSW"
- Secondary: "best Trucking accident attorney near me", "Trucking accident attorney company Blue Mountains NSW", "affordable Trucking accident attorney Blue Mountains NSW"
- Long-tail: "Trucking accident attorney cost Blue Mountains NSW", "Trucking accident attorney reviews Blue Mountains NSW", "how much does Trucking accident attorney cost in Blue Mountains NSW"

## Domain
**Primary:** truckingaccidentattorneybluemountainsnsw.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Blue Mountains NSW
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Trucking accident attorney in Blue Mountains NSW" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Case Evaluation)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Bar association badges, client testimonials, case results, AVVO rating
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Blue Mountains NSW address
- **H1:** Exactly "Trucking accident attorney Blue Mountains NSW" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /trucking-accident-attorney-blue-mountains-nsw/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Blue Mountains NSW
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to truckingaccidentattorneybluemountainsnsw.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Trucking accident attorney cost in Blue Mountains NSW?"
  2. "How long does Trucking accident attorney take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Trucking accident attorney?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $5,000/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)

1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Goulburn NSW
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Walk-in tub installation in Goulburn NSW" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Estimate / Schedule Consultation)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Portfolio gallery, manufacturer certifications, warranty info, financing available
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Goulburn NSW address
- **H1:** Exactly "Walk-in tub installation Goulburn NSW" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /walk-in-tub-installation-goulburn-nsw/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Goulburn NSW
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to walkintubinstallationgoulburnnsw.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Walk-in tub installation cost in Goulburn NSW?"
  2. "How long does Walk-in tub installation take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Walk-in tub installation?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $5,000/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)

opportunities.web_prompt:
# Lead Generation Website Build — Epoxy flooring in Oxnard CA

## Overview
Build a high-converting, mobile-first lead generation website for **Epoxy flooring** targeting **Oxnard CA**. This is a Rank & Rent site designed to capture leads and forward them to a local service provider for a monthly fee of **$5,000**.

## Target Market
- **Location:** Oxnard CA
- **Service:** Epoxy flooring
- **Average Job Value:** $5,500
- **Urgency Level:** 4/10 (Standard — 24-48hr response)
- **Page Type:** professional_service

## Primary Keywords to Target
- Main: "Epoxy flooring Oxnard CA"
- Secondary: "best Epoxy flooring near me", "Epoxy flooring company Oxnard CA", "affordable Epoxy flooring Oxnard CA"
- Long-tail: "Epoxy flooring cost Oxnard CA", "Epoxy flooring reviews Oxnard CA", "how much does Epoxy flooring cost in Oxnard CA"

## Domain
**Primary:** epoxyflooringoxnardca.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Oxnard CA
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Epoxy flooring in Oxnard CA" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Get Started)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Credentials, testimonials, process explanation, FAQ section
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Oxnard CA address
- **H1:** Exactly "Epoxy flooring Oxnard CA" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /epoxy-flooring-oxnard-ca/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Oxnard CA
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to epoxyflooringoxnardca.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Epoxy flooring cost in Oxnard CA?"
  2. "How long does Epoxy flooring take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Epoxy flooring?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $5,000/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)
